'''Lianna''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Lianna system/Legends|Lianna system]] in the [[Allied Tion sector/Legends|Allied Tion sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

{{Star-stub}}
